title: Japanese Broccoli Skewers
description: A simple and delicious Japanese-inspired broccoli skewer recipe. Perfect for a quick snack or side dish.
instructions: Thread broccoli florets onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a shallow dish, mix together crispy Japanese breading mix and sesame seeds (if using).
Dip each broccoli skewer into the breading mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Brush the grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the broccoli skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and tender.
Serve immediately, with soy sauce (if using) for dipping.
